task_name: External Statistical Methods Scouting For LotteryNew
review_type: read-only scouting (source index + method whitelist/blacklist + candidate feature family + validation rubric); no implementation, no DB/registry/production write, no strategy, no betting advice, no predictability claim
authorization: User directed 'import useful external methods ASAP to improve prediction success rate' and selected full P236A scouting (2026-06-04), after being shown and accepting on record that hit-rate improvement is closed by the system's own evidence and the honest expected outcome of broad scouting is NULL.
honest_framing: Falsification-oriented scout, not an edge hunt. Hit-rate prediction is closed (L82 539 signal exhausted, L91 BIG_LOTTO indistinguishable from random, P178A POWER_LOTTO 17 candidates NULL, SZC1 second-zone 0.1181<0.125). External methods do NOT reopen it. NULL is a valid complete result.

already_in_system_audit.summary: Per P234 CEO decision, 7 of 8 proposed external statistical methods already exist and are enforced.
already_in_system_audit.gap: Formal randomness-audit SSOT + continuous tripwire (NIST SP 800-22 style) is the single net-new diagnostic not already owned.

source_index.method: NIST SP 800-22 Rev 1a statistical test suite (15 tests; null = sequence is random)
source_index.purpose: randomness audit / null SSOT / tripwire; detects non-randomness; NOT a predictor
p-hacking guard via permutation null; use Binomial(baseline) MC null where label-shuffle preserves mean (L96)
benchmark (smoothed frequency), not a strategy; must beat random baseline

source_index.method: ML benchmark family (Naive Bayes / logistic / tree / XGBoost / sequence models)
source_index.purpose: falsification benchmarks only; severe overfit on low-base-rate games (L86/L89/L90)
design inspiration only (P235A); native re-derive only, no vendoring
payout lever: avoid crowded numbers -> less jackpot sharing -> higher E[payout|win]; NOT P(win)

source_index.method: Web 'lottery predictor' services / generators claiming edge

external_facts_confirmed: NIST SP 800-22's stated purpose is to detect non-random patterns in (P)RNG output for cryptographic validation; it confirms/falsifies randomness and does not forecast next values.
The unpopular-number literature consistently finds choosing unpopular combinations raises expected winnings via reduced prize-sharing, not the probability of winning; '7' is universally over-picked.
scikit-learn TimeSeriesSplit implements walk-forward with expanding training supersets; permutation_test_score builds a permutation null and can take TimeSeriesSplit as its cv.

candidate_feature_families_design_only.family: Universe length (distinct-number breadth in rolling K-draw window + dynamics)
candidate_feature_families_design_only.status: descriptive only; mostly novel framing; expected NULL under the gate
descriptive only; partial overlap with midfreq

validation_rubric: Pre-registration (P221F): hypothesis/windows/statistic fixed before touching OOS.
Null/baseline SSOT stated per game (539 M3+; POWER second-zone 1/8=0.125; BIG 6x6/49).
Permutation test p<0.05 using Binomial(baseline) Monte-Carlo null (not label-shuffle, L96).
Walk-forward/OOS expanding window, >=500 OOS draws (L101); unit = distinct draws.
Multiple-testing correction (Bonferroni/BH) across candidates x bet-slots x thresholds x windows (L47).
McNemar vs incumbent, replacement requires p<0.05 (L48/L61); passing gate != beating production (L76/L88).
Coverage-normalized at fixed bet count (no geometric-benefit trap, L37).
Sharpe>0 plus honest economic note (all games -EV; ruin_prob=1.000, L99).
Reproducibility: fixed seed, data snapshot, version tag.
NULL = success; in-sample improvement may never be claimed as generalizable.

primary_recommended.name: NIST-style randomness-audit SSOT + tripwire
primary_recommended.type: diagnostics-only, read-only, design-only (separate authorization to build)
primary_recommended.what: read-only module running an SP 800-22-adapted battery over each lottery's draw stream; produces the canonical randomness-audit report = SSOT null baseline all research must cite.
primary_recommended.why: lotteries are fair-random today and cannot be predicted; a continuous audit is a tripwire that alerts if draws ever stop being random — the only evidence-based condition under which prediction research reopens.
primary_recommended.is_not: not a predictor, not an edge, not betting advice
primary_recommended.boundaries: read-only; no DB write (artifact output only); per-game; multiple-testing-corrected (15 tests x games); reproducible seed/snapshot

secondary_optional.name: Payout / anti-crowd expected-value
secondary_optional.metric: raises E[payout|win] via reduced jackpot-sharing; does NOT raise P(win); EV stays negative
secondary_optional.prior_result: L102: anti-crowd on BIG_LOTTO ADVISORY_ONLY (perm p=0.257, swap 0.7%, w100=+0.00%)

risks: FALSE-PREDICTABILITY FRAMING: whole exercise risks being read as 'we found a way to win'; every artifact must fence hit-rate as closed.
RE-TREADING PAID-FOR NULLS: broad scouting largely repeats P234 (7/8 owned), P235A (Lofea), P178A, L82/L91; cost without new info unless scoped to net-new items.
AUDIT MULTIPLICITY: 15 NIST tests x 4 games x windows manufactures chance failures; tripwire must be multiplicity-corrected or becomes a false-alarm generator.
ML OVERFIT (S6): low base-rate games overfit catastrophically (L86 +6.5%->+0.12%; L89 ratio 10.35x); ML is falsification-only.
PAYOUT != HIT-RATE (S8): must never be reported as improving win odds; EV stays negative.
VENDORING / LICENSE (S7): Lofea CC-BY-NC; native re-derive only.
LEAKAGE: multi-draw labels/windows can leak future draws; enforce data-leakage-prevention.
SCOPE CREEP: scouting only; building the net-new items requires separate authorization.

recommendation.net_new_external_import_worth_doing: ONE — NIST-style randomness-audit SSOT/tripwire (diagnostics-only), as a separately-authorized read-only build.
recommendation.secondary_optional: Payout/anti-crowd EV read-only spike, labeled payout-not-hit-rate, with L102 caveat.
recommendation.smallest_safe_next_step: read-only design-doc for the randomness-audit SSOT; still no build, no DB; any build is a separate authorization.
